sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player is adjacent to center bar (b)
# Try SPACE to see if it affects the center bar
result = action(['SPACE'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After SPACE:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'G', 'W', 'N', 'b', 'g', 'P'] and n['pixels'] >= 8:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, rows [{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], px={n['pixels']}, children={n['children']}")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
